children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established within the Farmers Home Administration an Office of Rental Housing Preservation (hereafter in this section referred to as the “Office”). The Office shall be headed by a Director designated by the Secretary of Agriculture.
to review and process applications under and related to the preservation of rural rental housing;section 1472(c) of this titlesection 1485(t) of this title
to provide technical or financial assistance to any other projects needing such assistance;
to coordinate and direct all other activities related to the preservation of rural housing; and
to monitor compliance of projects prepaid or receiving incentives under the Housing Act of 1949.
